product_results.title: JETech Camera Lens Protector for iPhone 16 Pro 6.3-Inch and iPhone 16 Pro Max 6.9-Inch, 9H Tempered Glass, Anti-Scratch, Case Friendly, Does Not Affect Night Shots, HD Clear, 3-Pack

summary.text: Customers find this screen protector to be a quality product that fits perfectly and seamlessly under different phone cases. The protector is easy to install and applies effortlessly to camera lenses. Users appreciate that it surely protects the camera and comes with screen protection and a pouch. However, customers have mixed opinions on durability, adhesion, and picture quality.

authors_reviews.title: Fits iPhone 17 promax
authors_reviews.text: I bought this for my iPhone 17 promax as I have a rockform case that kinda makes your phone have the same kinda island as the iPhone 16. Works and fits perfectly. Definitely a good alternative for the iPhone 17 cases that cover half of the island/camera bump.
authors_reviews.author: Zachery

authors_reviews.title: Easy to use, saved my camera
authors_reviews.text: I’ve never bought a lens protector before for any of my previous phones but I thought I would try one for my new iPhone. Thank goodness I did! Two weeks after I got my phone it fell out of the car onto rock driveway and landed lens down on sharp rocks and it saved my lens! It did crack a piece off and exposed my real lens but the lense was saved thankfully due to the protective cover. Would definitely recommend. Wish it didn’t break off a chunk as easily (that’s why I have 4 stars… but it did the job!)
authors_reviews.author: Chris M.

authors_reviews.title: Great protector
authors_reviews.text: Fit well, even with an Otterbox phone protector. Did not affect camera picture at all.
authors_reviews.author: glevac1

authors_reviews.title: Great product
authors_reviews.text: Fits good dose come off after a while but ok product
authors_reviews.author: Carlo DeRose

authors_reviews.title: Easy to put on and does the job!
authors_reviews.text: I’m always worried I won’t do a good enough job putting stuff like this on - the screen protectors and lens protectors - but honestly it was easy (just like the screen protectors) and now our phones are protected and good to go! I really do appreciate that there are 3 in the box. I also bought another box just in case, but they appear to be stuck on there pretty good 😊 If you’re going to spend the money on a new phone, you might as well take all the precautions you can to protect it… and these fabulous products are inexpensive and helpful little ways to do it - definitely recommend!! 😊
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Great fit and solid protection for the price
authors_reviews.text: This is a great camera protector, especially for the price. The installation is super easy. It lined up well and went on smoothly with no bubbles. Honestly, it’s not hard to install in general, but this one was a breeze. The adhesive holds perfectly, no peeling or looseness at all once you've got it on.Photo and video quality are still good. If it affects anything, it’s barely noticeable and honestly, I find that the iPhone 16’s (base model) camera isn’t amazing to begin with, so I don’t think the protector is to blame.Once installed, it doesn’t really add any bulk. The phone camera sticks out on its own, so this protector doesn’t make a difference in how it feels or looks, especially if you’re using a case.I’ve dropped my phone a couple of times and it’s been fine. I also put one on my mom’s phone. Hers cracked, but she’s not exactly gentle with her devices, so that’s not surprising.Only small thing to note: it can pick up a bit of dirt around the edges, and there’s a tiny circular hole that collects a bit of dust, but it doesn’t affect performance or clarity at all.I’ve bought these many times and would definitely recommend it for anyone looking for simple, reliable lens protection.
authors_reviews.author: Brandy
